howItWorks.intro: This boat bottom paint calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Wetted Surface
rules.explanation: Approximation of hull area below waterline.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: How much bottom paint do I need?
faq.a: Calculate wetted surface area, then divide by coverage rate (about 400 sq ft/gal).
Most antifouling paint lasts 1-2 seasons depending on water conditions.
